name: js-select2
documentation:
# Introduction

```{image} https://api.travis-ci.org/delijati/js.select2.svg?branch=master
:alt: master Travis CI Status
:target: https://travis-ci.org/delijati/js.select2
```

This library packages [select2] for [fanstatic].

This requires integration between your web framework and `fanstatic`,
and making sure that the original resources (shipped in the `resources`
directory in `js.select2`) are published to some URL.

# How to use?

You can import `select2` from `js.select2` and `need` it where you want
these resources to be included on a page:

```
>>> from js.select2 import select2
>>> select2.need()
```

To use the full build use:

```
>>> from js.select2 import select2_full
>>> select2_full.need()
```
